name: Glutinous Rice Dough
recipeInstructions:
- To make the dough: Bring a pot of water to a rolling boil. In a bowl, combine the glutinous rice flour, potato flour, salt, and sugar. Gradually add the boiling water while stirring until all dry ingredients are incorporated.
- Knead the mixture on a floured surface for 3 or 4 minutes until smooth and elastic.
- To make sweet wrappers: Mix glutinous rice flour with mashed sweet potato in a bowl. Add brown sugar dissolved in water, then stir until a firm dough forms. Knead lightly for a few minutes until well combined.
Comments:
This recipe yields approximately 2 1/2 to 3 dozen wrappers, which are typically deep-fried with various fillings. The wrappers become soft and chewy inside while remaining crunchy and crispy on the outside.
